name: Tower Defense Starter
description: Path-based tower defense with tower placement grid, multiple tower types with distinct mechanics (splash, slow, sniper), enemy wave progression, economy system with gold and upgrades, and tower targeting logic.

projectStructure.project.godot: Godot 4.x with physics set to 2D, default scene: res://scenes/level.tscn, TileMap layer: path (red lines), placement_grid (grid overlay for valid zones)

scenes/.map.tscn: Node2D root with TileMap (base terrain), TileMap (path layer with Path2D visualized), TileMap (placement_grid overlay, semi-transparent), CanvasLayer (grid_visual)
scenes/.tower_base.tscn: Node2D with Sprite2D, Area2D (range circle, Range property), CollisionShape2D (tower footprint), range_indicator (Circle2D visual, shows on hover), health_value (100 HP), upgrade_level (0-3), last_shot_time (for cooldown tracking)
scenes/.tower_basic.tscn: Instance of tower_base.tscn with Sprite2D (blue square, 32x32), range (150), fire_rate (0.8s), damage (10), cost (100 gold), upgrade_cost_per_level (50), description: 'Balanced tower with steady DPS'
scenes/.tower_splash.tscn: Instance of tower_base.tscn with Sprite2D (green square), range (120), fire_rate (1.2s), damage (15), splash_radius (60), cost (200 gold), description: 'Hits enemies in area, deals reduced splash damage'
scenes/.tower_slow.tscn: Instance of tower_base.tscn with Sprite2D (cyan square), range (140), fire_rate (1.0s), damage (5), slow_duration (3s), slow_factor (0.5), cost (150 gold), description: 'Slows enemies; low damage'
scenes/.tower_sniper.tscn: Instance of tower_base.tscn with Sprite2D (purple square), range (200), fire_rate (1.8s), damage (30), cost (250 gold), description: 'Long range, high damage, slow fire rate'
scenes/.enemy_path.tscn: Path2D node with curve defined by waypoints; child PathFollow2D with playback_enabled, loop_enabled false
scenes/.enemy_basic.tscn: CharacterBody2D with Sprite2D (red circle, 16x16), CollisionShape2D, health (20 HP), speed (100), bounty (10 gold), path_follow_reference property
scenes/.enemy_fast.tscn: CharacterBody2D variant with Sprite2D (orange), health (10 HP), speed (180), bounty (5 gold)
scenes/.enemy_tank.tscn: CharacterBody2D variant with Sprite2D (brown large), health (50 HP), speed (60), bounty (30 gold)
scenes/.projectile.tscn: Area2D with Sprite2D (small circle, gray), velocity property, target_reference, damage_value, on_body_entered signal for hit detection, lifetime (10s)
scenes/.ui/build_menu.tscn: CanvasLayer with Panel (build panel), Button (tower_basic: 100g), Button (tower_splash: 200g), Button (tower_slow: 150g), Button (tower_sniper: 250g), selected_tower_label (shows cost and description on hover)
scenes/.ui/hud.tscn: CanvasLayer with Label (gold: 200), Label (lives: 20), Label (wave: 1/5), Label (enemies_remaining: 0/10), TextureProgressBar (lives visual), Button (start_wave, active when wave not running)
scenes/.ui/wave_info.tscn: CanvasLayer with Label (wave_title: 'Wave 1'), Timer (next_wave_countdown), enemy_count_display, auto_hide after wave completes
scenes/.game_over.tscn: CanvasLayer with ColorRect (black), Label (Victory / Defeat), Label (Final Gold), Label (Waves Completed), Button (restart), Button (main_menu)

scripts/.tower_base.gd: Node2D script: cost, range, fire_rate, damage, health, upgrade_level, upgrade_cost. Methods: _ready() initializes range_indicator, _process handles targeting (Area2D.get_overlapping_bodies() to find enemies in range), shoot(target) spawns projectile towards closest enemy, upgrade() increases level and range/damage by 20%, on_hit(damage) decrements health. Signals: on_destroyed, on_upgraded. Range_indicator drawn as Circle2D shape.
scripts/.tower_splash.gd: Extends tower_base.gd. Override shoot() method: spawn projectile to enemy position, on projectile_hit emit splash_explosion signal, query Area2D in splash_radius and apply 50% damage to all enemies in zone
scripts/.tower_slow.gd: Extends tower_base.gd. Override shoot() method: spawn projectile, on hit apply slow effect to target (speed *= slow_factor) for slow_duration seconds using Tween
scripts/.tower_sniper.gd: Extends tower_base.gd. Override targeting: ignores closest enemy, targets highest-health or furthest-along-path enemy (min distance to goal). Single target priority.
scripts/.enemy_base.gd: CharacterBody2D script: max_health, current_health, speed, bounty, path_follow (PathFollow2D reference). _process moves along path using path_follow.progress += speed * delta. on_hit(damage) reduces health, on_death emits enemy_defeated(bounty) signal, spawns gold_display floating text, queues_free. slow_active tracks active slow effects.
scripts/.enemy_ai.gd: Extends enemy_base.gd. Custom pathfinding using NavigationAgent2D if no Path2D. Recalculates path every 2s if player places tower in path.
scripts/.wave_manager.gd: Node script: current_wave, total_waves, wave_config list [{wave_num, enemy_list: [{type, count, spawn_interval}], gold_reward, intermission_time}]. Methods: start_wave() instantiates enemies in sequence, _on_enemy_defeated() tracks killed count, on_wave_complete() grants gold_reward, start intermission_timer. Emits: wave_started, wave_completed, all_waves_completed.
scripts/.economy.gd: Node script: current_gold (200 initial), income_per_wave, on_tower_purchased(cost) subtracts cost, on_enemy_defeated(bounty) adds bounty, on_wave_complete(bonus) adds bonus. Signals: gold_changed. Methods: can_afford(cost), spend_gold(cost), add_gold(amount).
scripts/.build_system.gd: Node2D script: selected_tower_type, selected_tower_instance (preview), placement_valid flag. _input handles mouse clicks on build_menu buttons (tower_basic/splash/slow/sniper). _process moves selected_tower_instance with mouse, checks placement validity (grid_overlay collision check). on_mouse_click: if placement_valid and economy.can_afford(cost), instantiate tower, deduct gold, clear_selection.
scripts/.audio_manager.gd: Node script: bgm_player (AudioStreamPlayer), sfx dict {place_tower, shoot, hit, sell_tower, wave_start, wave_complete}, play_sfx(key) and play_bgm(stream) methods

assets/.sprites/: tower_basic.png (32x32 blue square), tower_splash.png (32x32 green square), tower_slow.png (32x32 cyan square), tower_sniper.png (32x32 purple square), enemy_basic.png (16x16 red circle), enemy_fast.png (16x16 orange), enemy_tank.png (24x24 brown), projectile.png (6x6 gray circle), range_indicator_ring.png (ring shape)
assets/.audio/: bgm_level.ogg (loop), sfx_place_tower.wav, sfx_shoot.wav (laser), sfx_hit.wav (impact), sfx_sell.wav (reverse sound), sfx_wave_start.wav (ding), sfx_victory.wav
assets/.ui/: tower_basic_icon.png, tower_splash_icon.png, tower_slow_icon.png, tower_sniper_icon.png, gold_icon.png, lives_icon.png

preBuiltMechanics: Path2D-based enemy movement with PathFollow2D for smooth waypoint following
Tower placement system with grid validation and cost checking via economy system
Multiple tower types with distinct mechanics: basic (DPS), splash (AoE damage), slow (movement reduction), sniper (high single-target damage)
Targeting system using Area2D to detect enemies in range, prioritize by distance or health
Projectile spawning and trajectory towards target position
Wave progression system with configurable enemy counts, types, and spawn intervals
Gold economy: initial gold, kill bounties, wave completion bonuses, tower costs, upgrade costs
Tower upgrade system with 3 levels: each level increases range and damage by 20%, costs gold
Enemy health system with death detection and bounty rewards
Lives/hearts system with game over on threshold
customizationPoints: Define custom wave_config in wave_manager.gd: adjust enemy counts, spawn intervals, introduce new enemy types per wave
Create new tower types: duplicate tower_basic.tscn, create new_tower.gd extending tower_base.gd, add unique mechanics (piercing shots, chain lightning, poison area, etc.)
Modify tower_base.gd targeting logic: implement priority system (closest, furthest, lowest-health, highest-health)
Adjust economy: initial_gold, bounce_values, upgrade_costs, tower_costs, difficulty scaling (increase costs in later waves)
Customize enemy types: duplicate enemy_basic.tscn, adjust health/speed/bounty, add special behaviors (spawn_on_death, cloak, regen)
Add tower abilities: long cooldown special attacks (execute on key press or auto-trigger), resets on kill
Implement tower selling: refund 75% of tower cost, remove tower from grid
Add visual feedback: range_indicator circle shows on tower hover, place_preview shows ghost tower before confirmation
Create map variants: different path layouts, multiple paths, path intersections
examplePrompts: Create a 5-wave tower defense with progressively harder enemies: wave 1 has basic slow enemies, wave 5 has fast tanks mixed with cannon-fodder.
Implement a tower upgrade system where each level (1-3) increases range by 20 pixels, damage by 5 points, and costs 50 gold.
Design a splash tower that hits enemies in a 60-pixel radius with 50% damage to all enemies in the splash zone.
Add a slow tower that reduces enemy speed to 50% for 3 seconds, with visual feedback (blue tint overlay on slowed enemies).
Create an economy system where placing a tower costs gold, kills grant bounties, and wave completion bonuses accumulate.
Implement a grid-based placement system with valid/invalid zones; show red overlay on invalid placement, green on valid.
Build a wave info UI that shows current wave number, remaining enemies, time until next wave, and gold earned this wave.
Add a tower selling mechanic that refunds 75% of the tower's cost and removes it from the map.
